name: React Native — navigation (HIGH)
description: Prefer native navigators: `@react-navigation/native-stack` (not JS stack), native tabs (e.g. bottom native tabs / Expo Router native tabs). Prefer native header options over custom header components when possible.

metadata.intent: Use native navigation stacks and tabs for performance and platform UX

must_use: Native tab solutions when platform fidelity matters
must_not: Default to JS stack / JS tabs for primary app chrome without a deliberate reason
conventions: Prefer screen `options` (title, large title, search bar) over bespoke header trees.

steps.description: Evaluate native bottom tabs / Expo Router native tabs instead of pure JS tab bar for primary tabs.
Replace custom `header: () => …` where possible with native header configuration for large titles, blur, search.
